text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon. There was a girl named Celeste.

She loved collecting feathers.

One day she found a beautiful snowy owl feather.

So she collected many.

Then she made herself a bird house.

On it were her feathers.

She loved feathers.

She liked owl feathers especially.

Every night she'd take one.

She thought owls were great.


My favorite animal.

One starry night owl came.

Flew just under Celeste's feet.

He tucked feather into her hair.

She laughed.

That night.

She thought maybe she'd keep feather.

Maybe.

Every day.

Owl owl owl.

Maybe always.

I think I'll always love owls.



Owl owl owl.




I think I like owls.

Just because.

That's okay.

I'll keep you.

Maybe you'll grow big.

Like that owl.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
